approvals.scope: Token work frozen until after commerce launch.
approvals.notes: No token ownership, profit, governance, dividend, revenue-share, entitlement, price, or market language may be published. Freeze remains in force until a later recorded approval supersedes it.

approvals.notes: Shipping is included in the $50 USD price. Separate Stripe automatic tax collection remains disabled under operator responsibility.

approvals.scope: Prepare Local No. 001 production launch package.
approvals.notes: Codex may prepare launch checklists, preflight tooling, and production-readiness documentation. Checkout and Printify fulfillment remained disabled pending the later launch-window approval. The UTC timestamp was reconstructed from same-day operator-chat chronology and should be replaced if a raw source export is later retained.

approvals.scope: Public launch window for Local No. 001.
approvals.notes: The 2026-04-20 window was later treated as a controlled production rehearsal and closed without public commerce activity. Official launch remains pending a later operator approval.
